metadata.original_prompt: search about japanese army and create file called jpn_report2.txt contining on full report about the search results

tasks.title: Search information about the Japanese army
tasks.description: Conduct a search to gather comprehensive and accurate information on the history, structure, operations, and current status of the Japanese army (Japan Self-Defense Forces).

tasks.title: Summarize search results into a full report
tasks.description: Organize and condense the gathered information into a well-structured, coherent full report suitable for documentation.

tasks.title: Create file named jpn_report2.txt with the report content
tasks.description: Generate a text file named jpn_report2.txt containing the full summarized report.

args.query: Japanese army history structure operations current status Japan Self-Defense Forces
